TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan: == ťĄíśóŹTsou saka pitu a binacadan kakaliman: Tsou saka pitu a binacadan i Taywan, i teban a buyu'an a kakenis nu Taywan ku niyazu' nuheni, nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) nilaculan: Tsou saka pitu a binacadan a Alisan nu buyu'an a kakenis muenenay nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) 1:nilaculan atu kakanan nu Tsou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakalisuway nika uzip izaw ku ni "kalukan, miadup, mibuting atu misupet tu canacana" nu tademaw, maluk tu hapay tipus, uzupa', tali, unian kukakanan nu Tsou a binacadan. sakakapah asu'ay a kakanan sakakapah tu uzip, makani miadup, nikalaan tu kyumah, ngabul, sizi a titian cunus han tu nu ayamam atu buting a titi, sapicunus tu sakapah tu nu uzip, Tsou singanga tu nu aukay a henay. 2:zikuz:Tsou u paylimayay nu tatama atu tatayna u tatama nu buculay ku tupel pabanuhan tu nu ayamay, u tungusay u iyung nu heni, nu zikuz nu heni, u sapisanga tu zikuz u tatama uyza u bukul tatayna u nu kupa,atu nu nitemunan ku zikuz nuheni, u kulit uyza u sumanahay, sanglacay, lumeni'ay, sumilaway a kulitan, mangaleb nu tatama silusi u sumanahay yamin a kulit. 3:Tsou:matineng misanga' tu nalimaan milutlut tu bukal, hina nikaalaan tu aadupan ya bukal niza sapisanga' tu zikuz, ayaw namilutlut mipudac, minayat tya bukul, paacak, mikiskis tu banuh. 4:unisanga'an nu Tsou a luma ': u sapisanga' unian tulu ku sasanga'an tuni a tuud, dabek, lima', atu sapilangat, u ngangan nu Tsou a dabek, pangangan han tu , u maniza misatukalay a nisangaan a katalakaw, a dabek u pinananam nu tatama a matineng miadup atu lalangawan, satu sapiecaw a namalpacaw a kakitizaan. 5 (emo)u luma' nu Tsou unian u auk atu eli' ku sapisanga', u satanaya', samulmul sa tusa, i lalabu nu luma', u sapingizu nu heni, i pabaw izaw ku ni sangaan tu langat u sapipaceng sapisupet tu tuud atu u bukul nu aadupan, i lalabu nu lima', mahiza tusa kuni nu kakayzaan, tusa ku sa cumut sawali ku panan anu tatama a sacumut, saetip sa u zikuzan a panan nu tatayna a sacumut. 6 u sapilisin tu luma' (emo nopesia) i kasumamadan i lalabu nu luma' tu kawilian i lalabu nu luma', izaw ku ni sangaan tu palut u sapisahemay tu salisinan a kakanan i lakabu nu luma' u kasahenulan sulu' u hapay a di'tu a aenengan, lacus misalami' tu buting u zuma satu,wini a sapisalisin a lima' kitizaan ami betik tu lubec nu hapay, wizaaza u kalitizaan nu sikawasay amingaay tu imelangay nu binawlan a tademaw, satu u tinakuay tu anigil nu palumaan.
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan: == **tsou saka pitu a bina ¶adan kakar~…ĺiman: tsou saka pitu a bina ¶adan i tajwan, i t…ôban a buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis nu tajwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan: tsou saka pitu a bina ¶adan a ar~…ĺisan nu buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis mu…ôn…ônaj nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) *:nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu kakanan nu tsou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakar~…ĺisuwaj nika uzip izaw ku ni "kar~…ĺukan, miadup, mibutiŇč atu misup…ôt tu ¶ana ¶ana" nu tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺuk tu ńßapaj tipus, uzupa Ē~ °, tar~…ĺi, unian kukakanan nu tsou a bina ¶adan. sakakapańß asu Ē~ °aj a kakanan sakakapańß tu uzip, makani miadup, nikar~…ĺaan tu kjumańß, Ňčabur~…ĺ, sizi a titian ¶unus ńßan tu nu ajamam atu butiŇč a titi, sapi ¶unus tu sakapańß tu nu uzip, tsou siŇčaŇča tu nu aukaj a ńß…ônaj. *:zikuz:tsou u pajr~…ĺimajaj nu tatama atu tatajna u tatama nu bu ¶ur~…ĺaj ku tup…ôr~…ĺ pabanuńßan tu nu ajamaj, u tuŇčusaj u ijuŇč nu ńß…ôni, nu zikuz nu ńß…ôni, u sapisaŇča tu zikuz u tatama ujza u bukur~…ĺ tatajna u nu kupa,atu nu nit…ômunan ku zikuz nuńß…ôni, u kur~…ĺit ujza u sumanańßaj, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj, sumir~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺitan, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb nu tatama sir~…ĺusi u sumanańßaj jamin a kur~…ĺit. *:tsou:matin…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nar~…ĺimaan mir~…ĺutr~…ĺut tu bukar~…ĺ, ńßina nikaar~…ĺaan tu aadupan ja bukar~…ĺ niza sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu zikuz, ajaw namir~…ĺutr~…ĺut mipuda ¶, minajat tja bukur~…ĺ, paa ¶ak, mikiskis tu banuńß. *:unisaŇča Ē~ °an nu tsou a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °: u sapisaŇča Ē~ ° unian tur~…ĺu ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an tuni a tuud, dab…ôk, r~…ĺima Ē~ °, atu sapir~…ĺaŇčat, u ŇčaŇčan nu tsou a dab…ôk, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu , u maniza misatukar~…ĺaj a nisaŇčaan a katar~…ĺakaw, a dab…ôk u pinananam nu tatama a matin…ôŇč miadup atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, satu sapi…ô ¶aw a namar~…ĺpa ¶aw a kakitizaan. * (…ômo)u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tsou unian u auk atu …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku sapisaŇča Ē~ °, u satanaja Ē~ °, samur~…ĺmur~…ĺ sa tusa, i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u sapiŇčizu nu ńß…ôni, i pabaw izaw ku ni saŇčaan tu r~…ĺaŇčat u sapipa ¶…ôŇč sapisup…ôt tu tuud atu u bukur~…ĺ nu aadupan, i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺima Ē~ °, mańßiza tusa kuni nu kakajzaan, tusa ku sa ¶umut sawar~…ĺi ku panan anu tatama a sa ¶umut, sa…ôtip sa u zikuzan a panan nu tatajna a sa ¶umut. * u sapir~…ĺisin tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (…ômo nop…ôsia) i kasumamadan i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu kawir~…ĺian i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, izaw ku ni saŇčaan tu par~…ĺut u sapisańß…ômaj tu sar~…ĺisinan a kakanan i r~…ĺakabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u kasańß…ônur~…ĺan sur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u ńßapaj a di Ē~ °tu a a…ôn…ôŇčan, r~…ĺa ¶us misar~…ĺami Ē~ ° tu butiŇč u zuma satu,wini a sapisar~…ĺisin a r~…ĺima Ē~ ° kitizaan ami b…ôtik tu r~…ĺub…ô ¶ nu ńßapaj, wizaaza u kar~…ĺitizaan nu sikawasaj amiŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, satu u tinakuaj tu anigir~…ĺ nu par~…ĺumaan.
S.FORM: == tatangahan: == ťĄíśóŹTsou saka pitu a binacadan kakaliman: Tsou saka pitu a binacadan i Taywan, i teban a buyu'an a kakenis nu Taywan ku niyazu' nuheni, nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) nilaculan: Tsou saka pitu a binacadan a Alisan nu buyu'an a kakenis muenenay nu Alisan akenis a buyu', i tebanay i talakaway a buyu' nu Taywan, izaw ku lisin nu heni tu kapahay a ci salangec tu habay ŚįŹÁĪ≥śĒ∂Á©ęÁ•≠ŚÖł(homeyaya)a mikukay tu kakasan, atu palimulak tu talumaay nu malpacaway a lisin.ŤąáŚáĪśóčÁ•≠(mayasvi) 1:nilaculan atu kakanan nu Tsou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakalisuway nika uzip izaw ku ni "kalukan, miadup, mibuting atu misupet tu canacana" nu tademaw, maluk tu hapay tipus, uzupa', tali, unian kukakanan nu Tsou a binacadan. sakakapah asu'ay a kakanan sakakapah tu uzip, makani miadup, nikalaan tu kyumah, ngabul, sizi a titian cunus han tu nu ayamam atu buting a titi, sapicunus tu sakapah tu nu uzip, Tsou singanga tu nu aukay a henay. 2:zikuz:Tsou u paylimayay nu tatama atu tatayna u tatama nu buculay ku tupel pabanuhan tu nu ayamay, u tungusay u iyung nu heni, nu zikuz nu heni, u sapisanga tu zikuz u tatama uyza u bukul tatayna u nu kupa,atu nu nitemunan ku zikuz nuheni, u kulit uyza u sumanahay, sanglacay, lumeni'ay, sumilaway a kulitan, mangaleb nu tatama silusi u sumanahay yamin a kulit. 3:Tsou:matineng misanga' tu nalimaan milutlut tu bukal, hina nikaalaan tu aadupan ya bukal niza sapisanga' tu zikuz, ayaw namilutlut mipudac, minayat tya bukul, paacak, mikiskis tu banuh. 4:unisanga'an nu Tsou a luma ': u sapisanga' unian tulu ku sasanga'an tuni a tuud, dabek, lima', atu sapilangat, u ngangan nu Tsou a dabek, pangangan han tu , u maniza misatukalay a nisangaan a katalakaw, a dabek u pinananam nu tatama a matineng miadup atu lalangawan, satu sapiecaw a namalpacaw a kakitizaan. 5 (emo)u luma' nu Tsou unian u auk atu eli' ku sapisanga', u satanaya', samulmul sa tusa, i lalabu nu luma', u sapingizu nu heni, i pabaw izaw ku ni sangaan tu langat u sapipaceng sapisupet tu tuud atu u bukul nu aadupan, i lalabu nu lima', mahiza tusa kuni nu kakayzaan, tusa ku sa cumut sawali ku panan anu tatama a sacumut, saetip sa u zikuzan a panan nu tatayna a sacumut. 6 u sapilisin tu luma' (emo nopesia) i kasumamadan i lalabu nu luma' tu kawilian i lalabu nu luma', izaw ku ni sangaan tu palut u sapisahemay tu salisinan a kakanan i lakabu nu luma' u kasahenulan sulu' u hapay a di'tu a aenengan, lacus misalami' tu buting u zuma satu,wini a sapisalisin a lima' kitizaan ami betik tu lubec nu hapay, wizaaza u kalitizaan nu sikawasay amingaay tu imelangay nu binawlan a tademaw, satu u tinakuay tu anigil nu palumaan.
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan: == **tsou saka pitu a bina ¶adan kakar~…ĺiman: tsou saka pitu a bina ¶adan i tajwan, i t…ôban a buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis nu tajwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni, nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan: tsou saka pitu a bina ¶adan a ar~…ĺisan nu buju Ē~ °an a kak…ônis mu…ôn…ônaj nu ar~…ĺisan ak…ônis a buju Ē~ °, i t…ôbanaj i tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, izaw ku r~…ĺisin nu ńß…ôni tu kapańßaj a ¶i sar~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ tu ńßabaj ******(ńßom…ôaja)a mikukaj tu kakasan, atu par~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu tar~…ĺumaaj nu mar~…ĺpa ¶awaj a r~…ĺisin.****(majas*i) *:nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan atu kakanan nu tsou nu tuas anika uzip atu nupakar~…ĺisuwaj nika uzip izaw ku ni "kar~…ĺukan, miadup, mibutiŇč atu misup…ôt tu ¶ana ¶ana" nu tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺuk tu ńßapaj tipus, uzupa Ē~ °, tar~…ĺi, unian kukakanan nu tsou a bina ¶adan. sakakapańß asu Ē~ °aj a kakanan sakakapańß tu uzip, makani miadup, nikar~…ĺaan tu kjumańß, Ňčabur~…ĺ, sizi a titian ¶unus ńßan tu nu ajamam atu butiŇč a titi, sapi ¶unus tu sakapańß tu nu uzip, tsou siŇčaŇča tu nu aukaj a ńß…ônaj. *:zikuz:tsou u pajr~…ĺimajaj nu tatama atu tatajna u tatama nu bu ¶ur~…ĺaj ku tup…ôr~…ĺ pabanuńßan tu nu ajamaj, u tuŇčusaj u ijuŇč nu ńß…ôni, nu zikuz nu ńß…ôni, u sapisaŇča tu zikuz u tatama ujza u bukur~…ĺ tatajna u nu kupa,atu nu nit…ômunan ku zikuz nuńß…ôni, u kur~…ĺit ujza u sumanańßaj, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj, sumir~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺitan, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb nu tatama sir~…ĺusi u sumanańßaj jamin a kur~…ĺit. *:tsou:matin…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu nar~…ĺimaan mir~…ĺutr~…ĺut tu bukar~…ĺ, ńßina nikaar~…ĺaan tu aadupan ja bukar~…ĺ niza sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu zikuz, ajaw namir~…ĺutr~…ĺut mipuda ¶, minajat tja bukur~…ĺ, paa ¶ak, mikiskis tu banuńß. *:unisaŇča Ē~ °an nu tsou a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °: u sapisaŇča Ē~ ° unian tur~…ĺu ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an tuni a tuud, dab…ôk, r~…ĺima Ē~ °, atu sapir~…ĺaŇčat, u ŇčaŇčan nu tsou a dab…ôk, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu , u maniza misatukar~…ĺaj a nisaŇčaan a katar~…ĺakaw, a dab…ôk u pinananam nu tatama a matin…ôŇč miadup atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, satu sapi…ô ¶aw a namar~…ĺpa ¶aw a kakitizaan. * (…ômo)u r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tsou unian u auk atu …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku sapisaŇča Ē~ °, u satanaja Ē~ °, samur~…ĺmur~…ĺ sa tusa, i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u sapiŇčizu nu ńß…ôni, i pabaw izaw ku ni saŇčaan tu r~…ĺaŇčat u sapipa ¶…ôŇč sapisup…ôt tu tuud atu u bukur~…ĺ nu aadupan, i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺima Ē~ °, mańßiza tusa kuni nu kakajzaan, tusa ku sa ¶umut sawar~…ĺi ku panan anu tatama a sa ¶umut, sa…ôtip sa u zikuzan a panan nu tatajna a sa ¶umut. * u sapir~…ĺisin tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (…ômo nop…ôsia) i kasumamadan i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu kawir~…ĺian i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, izaw ku ni saŇčaan tu par~…ĺut u sapisańß…ômaj tu sar~…ĺisinan a kakanan i r~…ĺakabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° u kasańß…ônur~…ĺan sur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u ńßapaj a di Ē~ °tu a a…ôn…ôŇčan, r~…ĺa ¶us misar~…ĺami Ē~ ° tu butiŇč u zuma satu,wini a sapisar~…ĺisin a r~…ĺima Ē~ ° kitizaan ami b…ôtik tu r~…ĺub…ô ¶ nu ńßapaj, wizaaza u kar~…ĺitizaan nu sikawasaj amiŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, satu u tinakuaj tu anigir~…ĺ nu par~…ĺumaan.
